summary: Edition-Aware Character Creation Testing - GENERATE mode. FIXED a critical bug where 'edition' field was passed twice to PlayerCharacter causing 500 errors. All tests pass - 21 backend + 10 frontend.

breakdown.backend_edition_character_creation: 21/21 passed - Edition rules validation, hit dice, HP calculation, spell persistence
breakdown.frontend_edition_character_creation: 10/10 passed - Edition selection UI, SRD races display, class hit dice

seed_data_creation: Test characters created and cleaned up automatically during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edition-aware character creation fully tested. Backend validates subclass selection based on edition rules (2014: Cleric L1, Sorcerer L1, Warlock L1, Wizard L2, Druid L2, others L3; 2024: all classes L3). Hit dice correctly calculated per class (Barbarian d12, Fighter/Paladin/Ranger d10, others d8/d6). max_hit_points field properly used. Spells persist to character record. Edition field stored on character. Frontend shows edition selection, SRD races appear first, class cards show hit dice.

edition_selection_2014_vs_2024.details: Frontend shows edition selection screen with 2014/2024 options, correctly labels 'Using [edition] Rules'

subclass_validation_2014.details: 2014 rules: Cleric/Sorcerer/Warlock L1, Wizard/Druid L2, others L3 - all validated correctly

subclass_validation_2024.details: 2024 rules: All classes get subclass at L3 - validation rejects earlier selections

hit_dice_calculation.details: Barbarian d12, Fighter/Paladin/Ranger d10, Bard/Cleric/Druid/Monk/Rogue/Warlock d8, Sorcerer/Wizard d6

max_hit_points_field.details: max_hit_points auto-calculated from hit die + CON mod, or uses provided value

spell_persistence.details: spells_known array saved to character record and retrievable via GET

edition_field_storage.details: edition field ('2014' or '2024') properly stored on character

srd_races_first.details: SRD races (Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, etc.) appear first in race selection

error_messages.details: Backend returns proper error messages mentioning unlock level and class name

edition_duplicate_field.issue: edition field was not excluded from char_data, causing 'got multiple values for keyword argument edition' error
edition_duplicate_field.fix: Added 'edition' to excluded_fields list when building PlayerCharacter
